faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Douglaston home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small irregular holes in wool clothing or carpets, silky tubes or cases on fabrics, adult moths flying around closets or bedrooms, and larvae (small white caterpillars) on textiles. You may also notice damage to upholstered furniture, blankets, or other natural fiber items stored in your Douglaston home.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Douglaston?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Douglaston typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of affected areas. Minor infestations in a single closet cost less, while whole-home treatments for severe infestations require more extensive service. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning treatment.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most clothes moth treatments show immediate results, but complete elimination typically takes 2-4 weeks as the treatment targets moths at all life stages. We often recommend follow-up visits to ensure all eggs, larvae, and adult moths are eliminated. Our technicians will provide specific timelines based on your infestation level and create a customized treatment plan for your Douglaston property.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regularly cleaning and vacuuming closets, storing seasonal clothing in sealed containers, using cedar blocks or lavender sachets as natural deterrents, and dry cleaning items before long-term storage. Our Douglaston team provides detailed prevention strategies and can set up ongoing monitoring to catch any future moth activity before it becomes a problem.
